title: Cloudflare Workers Builds — production CI (no GitHub Actions billing)
description: Merge to main on GitHub → Cloudflare builds and deploys. GitHub only stores code; Cloudflare runs the pipeline.

steps: Build command (optional, refreshes match JSON before deploy): npm run refresh:matches
Save — push to main to verify
dashboard_setup.note: GitHub OAuth is between Cloudflare and GitHub — does NOT use GitHub Actions minutes or billing.

environment_variables_optional.SPORTSDB_KEY: TheSportsDB API key (optional, default free key in script)

preview_trigger.note: Uploads preview versions without promoting to korazero.com

manual_fallback.refresh_matches_commit: npm run refresh:matches && git add assets/data assets/js/channel-bindings.js && git commit && git push

api_setup_optional.note: Workers Builds API requires a USER-scoped token with Workers Builds Configuration Edit — account cfat_ tokens cannot configure builds.
